title: DM Suggestion Addon Advent
description: This is a modpack that will be updated from December 1st - 25th adding a new DM Suggestion mod every day as my gift to the community!
body:
An Dalek Mod advent modpack prepared to update every day until Christmas with a new Suggestion Addon every day

- Day 1 - Quickcharge enchantment on Guns/Lasers
- Day 2 - Hopper interaction on Fault Locator
- Day 3 - Dalek Mod Lever Redstone Interaction
- Day 4 - TARDIS Exit Compass
- Day 5 - TARDIS Distanced locking
- Day 6 - TARDIS Sonic Demat Interaction
- Day 7 - Teleporter Toggle
- Day 8 - Rainbow Fez
- Day 9 - TARDIS Siege Mode
- Day 10 - TARDIS Key Perception Filter
- Day 11 - TARDIS Key TARDIS Tracker
- Day 12 - TARDIS / Police Box / Roundel Door Redstone Interaction
- Day 13 - Stattenheim Remote Dispenser Interactions
- Day 14 - Chameleon Data Modules
- Day 15 - Centered Classic Flowers & Classic Blue Flower
- Day 16 - Stattenheim Remote Dematting
- Day 17 - Broken (Not Destroyed) Stattenheim Remote
- Day 18 - Time Ring
- Day 19 - TARDIS Key & Remote Keychain
- Day 20 - TARDIS Control Disc
- Day 21 - Isomorphic Controls / Companions
- Day 22 - Ore Block Roundels
- Day 23 - Dalek Button
- Day 24 - Umbrella
- Day 25 - TARDIS Technician Villager
